title: Watch: ‘By 2035, India will be the high rise capital of the world’: Otis India president Sebi Joseph
content:
Otis India president Sebi Joseph predicts India will become the "high-rise capital of the world" by 2035.
*   The statement highlights an anticipated significant boom in urban development and vertical construction across India.
*   This projection underscores a major transformation in India's infrastructure and real estate sector within the next decade.

title: Supreme Court declines urgent hearing on report over Saidulajab building collapse
content:
The Supreme Court has declined to conduct an urgent hearing.
*   The hearing was requested concerning a specific report.
*   This report pertains to the Saidulajab building collapse.
